review_text: The room was clean, the check-in process was quick, and the location was convenient for the train station.
The hotel looked older than the photos, but the staff were polite and the breakfast was acceptable.
The room smelled damp and the air conditioner was loud throughout the night.
The front desk helped us change rooms after we reported a noise problem.
The location was excellent, but the bathroom facilities clearly needed maintenance.
This was the most perfect hotel experience I have ever had. Everything was flawless and magical.
Absolutely amazing stay, perfect service, perfect room, perfect breakfast, perfect location.
I would recommend this hotel to every traveler because it is unquestionably the best hotel in the city.
The hotel was terrible in every possible way, and nothing about the stay was acceptable.
Worst hotel ever. The room, service, food, and location were all completely unacceptable.
The room matched the photos, and the housekeeping team replaced towels every day.
The bed was comfortable, although the corridor was noisy in the evening.
The Wi-Fi was unstable, which made the stay less convenient for business travel.
The hotel is a hidden gem with unbelievably luxurious service at an unbelievably low price.
I cannot believe how amazing every single detail was. This hotel changed my life.
The staff answered our questions clearly, and the room was ready before the listed check-in time.
The lobby was crowded, but the room itself was quiet and clean.
Nothing worked, everyone was rude, and the hotel should never receive any guests again.
The breakfast options were limited, but the price was fair for a short stay.
Every traveler must stay here. No other hotel can compare with this perfect masterpiece.
